popularStory.headline: Captain Thomas Tibbals
popularStory.description:
07-27-2014:  http://www.findagrave.com/cgi-bin/fg.cgi?page=gr&GRid=16396170
It's been said that Thomas was 20 years of age when he came to New England in 1635 on the ship "Truelove" in the company of …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Tibbals於1613年6月27日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛時，他的父親Thomas Tibballs38歲，母親Avis Streame28歲。他於1634年與Sarah Seabrook在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦結婚。他於1660年住在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德。他於1654年登記服兵役。他去世於1703年4月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德享年89歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德米爾福德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Tibbals于1613年6月27日出生在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛时，他的父亲Thomas Tibballs38岁，母亲Avis Streame28岁。他于1634年与Sarah Seabrook在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦结婚。他于1660年住在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德。他于1654年登记服兵役。他去世于1703年4月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德享年89岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文米爾福德米爾福德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Tibbals
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Tibbles
meanings: English (Hertfordshire): variant of Tibble , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
New Haven County was created on 10 May 1666, and was named for an English port town called Newhaven, London, England

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Tibbals was born on 27 June 1613, in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas Tibballs, was 38 and his mother, Avis Streame, was 28. He married Sarah Seabrook in 1634, in New London, New London, Connecticut, United States. He lived in Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, United States in 1660. He registered for military service in 1654. He died on 8 April 1703, in Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 89, and was buried in Milford Cemetery, Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Tibbals est né le 27 juin 1613, à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Tibballs, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Avis Streame, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Seabrook en 1634, à New London, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis. Il a vécu à Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis en 1660. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1654. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1703, à Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterré à Milford Cemetery, Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Tibbals am 27. Juni 1613 in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Tibballs 38 und seine Mutter Avis Streame 28. Er hat 1634 in New London, New London, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Sarah Seabrook geheiratet. 1660 hat er in Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er hat sich 1654 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 8. April 1703 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Milford Cemetery, Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Tibbals è nato il il 27 giugno 1613 nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Tibballs, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Avis Streame, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Seabrook nel 1634, nel New London, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Vissuto a Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1660. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1654. Morì il 8 aprile 1703, nel Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolto a Milford Cemetery, Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Tibbalsが1613年6月27日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウで生まれた時，父Thomas Tibballsは38歳，母Avis Streameは28歳であった。1634年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンでSarah Seabrookと結婚した。彼は1660年にはアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンミルフォードに住んでいた。彼は1654年に兵役登録をした。彼は1703年4月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンミルフォードで89歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンミルフォードミルフォード セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Tibbals(이)가 1613년 6월 27일 영국 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Tibballs(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Avis Streame(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1634년 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던에서 Sarah Seabrook(와)과 결혼했다. 1660년도에 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 미퍼드에서 살았다. 그는 1654년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1703년 4월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 미퍼드에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 미퍼드 미퍼드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Tibbals nasceu em 27 de junho de 1613, em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Tibballs, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Avis Streame, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Seabrook em 1634, em New London, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Ele viveu em Milford, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América em 1660. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1654. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1703, em Milford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 89 anos, e foi sepultado em Milford Cemetery, Milford, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Tibbals родился 27 июня 1613 г. в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Tibballs было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Avis Streame, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Seabrook в 1634 г. в местности ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. Он жил в местности милфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в 1660 году. В 1654 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 8 апреля 1703 г. в местности милфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 89 лет и был похоронен в местности милфорд кеметири, милфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Tibbals nació el 27 de junio de 1613, en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Tibballs, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Avis Streame, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sarah Seabrook en 1634, en New London, New London, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Vivió en Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos en 1660. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1654. Murió el 8 de abril de 1703, en Milford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultado en Milford Cemetery, Milford, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
